2010-T1-P3-S1.trunk: S+be+表：We are (even farther) removed from the … newspaper reviews（我们离那些报纸评论更遥远）
structure: 主句：We are even farther removed from the unfocused newspaper reviews
└ 过去分词作后置定语〔修饰 reviews〕：published in England between the turn of the 20th century and the eve of World War II
└ 定语从句〔when，修饰 a time〕：when newsprint was dirt-cheap and stylish arts criticism was considered an ornament to the publications
└ 并列分句②(and)：stylish arts criticism was considered an ornament to the publications
└ 定语从句〔in which，修饰 publications〕：in which it appeared
2010-T1-P3-S1.logic: published… 分词短语作定语修饰 reviews；when 引导定语从句修饰 a time，其内部两分句由 and 并列；最末 in which 定语从句修饰 publications。
notes: be removed from 在此意为「远离 / 有距离」，不是「被移走」。
published… 是过去分词作后置定语（修饰 reviews），不是句子的谓语。
when 引导的是修饰 a time 的定语从句，不是时间状语从句。
生词：newsprint 新闻纸；dirt-cheap 极其便宜；ornament 装饰、点缀。

2010-T1-P3-S5.trunk: 引语主干（so … that 结果结构）：So few authors have … that I am tempted to define 'journalism' as …（鲜有作者… 以至于我想把「新闻业」定义为…）
structure: 插入语：Newman wrote（把一句直接引语劈成前后两半）
引语 = so few … that … 结果结构：
主句：So few authors have brains enough or literary gift enough
└ 不定式作状语〔修饰 enough〕：to keep their own end up in journalism
结果状语从句(that)：that I am tempted to define 'journalism' as 'a term of contempt …'
├ 定语从句〔who，修饰前一 writers〕：writers who are not read
└ 定语从句〔who，修饰后一 writers〕：writers who are〔are 后省略 read〕
2010-T1-P3-S5.logic: so few … that … 表结果（如此少…以至于…）；applied by…to… 过去分词作定语修饰 a term；两个 who 定语从句对比「not read（不被读）」与「are (read)（被读）」。
notes: Newman wrote 是插入语，还原后引语是「So few … that I am tempted …」。
writers who are 后省略了 read（= writers who are read），与前面 who are not read 形成对比。
短语：keep one's end up 尽本分、不落下风；a term of contempt 蔑称。

2010-T1-P4-S2.trunk: S+be known as：Neville Cardus is now known solely as a writer of essays on cricket（如今 N. 卡尔达斯仅以板球随笔作者闻名）
structure: 主句：Neville Cardus is now known solely as a writer of essays on the game of cricket
└ 非限制性定语从句〔who，修饰 Neville Cardus，双逗号夹、可删〕：who wrote for the Manchester Guardian from 1917 until shortly before his death in 1975
2010-T1-P4-S2.logic: who 非限制性定语从句补充说明 Neville Cardus 的生平；与主句「如今只以板球随笔闻名」隐含「曾…如今却只…」的对比，宜拆译。
notes: 主谓分隔：主语 Neville Cardus 与谓语 is known 被 who 从句隔开，读时把两端复位。
非限制性定语从句（带逗号）宜拆译、另起一句，不要硬塞成「…的」。
短语：be known as 作为…而闻名；solely 仅仅、唯独。
